body:
Tomoko, great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Summit](events/breakthrough-energy-summit) last week — I always come away from those conversations with a clearer sense of where the smart money is actually moving. I wanted to follow up on our chat about the energy storage space, specifically around the two grid-edge companies you mentioned that are raising in Q1. We've been doing a lot of conviction-building around long-duration storage at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), and I think at least one of them could be a genuine fit for where we're deploying right now. Would you be open to a quick intro, even at the exploratory stage? I'm happy to share our current thesis deck so you have a sense of what we'd be looking for before we make any ask of your founders. Let me know what makes sense on your end.

Amara
